rationale: Acting on review 2 yields the better scoped PR: its bundling finding is directly confirmed by the diff's AffineAlgGroup definition (lines 34-37, which combines finiteType + geomReduced), correctly requiring the split the roadmap forbids; both reviews agree the IsUnipotent and True-stub Layer 5-6 classes must be dropped, so only this produces the properly minimal on-roadmap unit without wasted or incorrect structure.
